question.text: Sub-brokers as an intermediary ceased to exist from which date as per SEBI decision?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI Board decided on June 21, 2018 that sub-brokers shall cease to exist from April 01, 2019. Existing sub-brokers would migrate to become Authorized Persons (APs) or Trading Members. **The Trap:** June 21, 2018 was the decision date, not the effective date. Sept 2015 was SEBI takeover. Jan 2020 is incorrect. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers broker intermediary structure. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** All former sub-brokers are now either Authorized Persons or Trading Members — check the status of any intermediary claiming sub-broker status.
